identity.name: Chicago Cultural Center
identity.address: 78 E Washington St, Chicago, IL 60602, USA

discovery.text: Verified for Michigan Avenue: the Chicago Cultural Center sits immediately off Michigan and gives the avenue one of its strongest free civic interiors — exhibitions, performances, and public rooms that deepen the street beyond retail and office frontage.

narrative.summary: A major public cultural building just off Michigan Avenue that helps the boulevard read as civic space, not only commerce.

blocks.title: Why it teaches the street
blocks.body: Michigan Avenue is strongest where monumental frontage connects to usable public interiors. The Cultural Center does that beautifully: a grand civic edge one block off the avenue, free to enter, and active enough to keep pedestrians circulating between the boulevard, Millennium Park, and the Loop.
